titleStmt.title: SII 24.326: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 326. (A.R. No. 93 of 1938-39.) CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, EAST BASE

summary.p: Registers a gift of the village Vaḍa-Kiḷiyūr in Veṇbā-nāḍu for providing offerings etc., to the god by Bemmaṇa-Nāyaka, Rāmaya-Nāyaka and Māṇikka-Gaṅgaṇa-Nāyaka of Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi, men of the bodyguard (pāḍi) of Sāḷuva-Nāyaka. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1352, Sādhāraṇa, Vṛiśchika, śu. 12 Wednesday, Rēvati, are irregular. On the day of the Uthāna-dvādaśi, it was the 29th day of the solar month Tulā corresponding to Saturday, 28th October, 1430 A.D. The nakshatra Rēvati which commenced at ·20 of the day ended the next day at ·15.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahārājādhirājan Irājaparameśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa devarāya mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 100 3 10 52 mel cellā niṉṟa sādhāraṇavaruṣattu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvādaśi yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revatināḷ Utthānadvādaśipuṇyakālattil peru māḷ śrī raṅgarājar śrī bhaṇṭārattukku tiruccirāppaḷḷi cāḷuva nāyakkapāṭi kaḷil
pāta cāḷuvaṉ naṭai koṭṭai mallaṉ maccarippa nāyakkar micara kaṇṭaṉ pemmaṇa nāyakkar Irāma nāyakkar māṇikka kaṅkaṇa nāyakkar Upaiyamāka nāḷtoṟum Oru taḷikai Amutu ceyyap paṇṇak kaṭava paṇṇi dhārāpūrvamākac cettuk kuṭutta veṇpānāṭu vaṭakiḷiyūr nāṉkellai kuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey maṟṟum meppeṟpaṭṭa mutal cantiṟātittavaraiyum sarva [ mānnya] tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka naṭakka kaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.326 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
